hooks.command: output=$(python3 tools/pii_scan.py 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'pii-scan found issues — fix before committing:\n'+sys.argv[1]}))" "$output"; fi; exit $rc

output=$(python3 tools/pii_scan.py 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'pii-scan found issues — fix before pushing:\n'+sys.argv[1]}))" "$output"; fi; exit $rc
